menu.title: Nightmare Assault
menu.confirm_quit: Are you sure you want to quit?

commands.lang_desc: Switch language (/lang zh-TW or /lang zh-CN or /lang en-US)
commands.log_desc: View game log or set log level

errors.network_failure: Unable to connect to the network. Please check your connection.
errors.network_suggestion:
Please check:
• Network connection status
• Firewall settings
• Proxy configuration
errors.api_timeout: LLM API request timed out. Server response took too long.
errors.api_key_invalid: API Key validation failed. Please check your API Key settings.
errors.api_key_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Enter /api to reconfigure API Key
• Verify API Key format
• Check if API Key has expired
errors.api_connection_failed: Unable to connect to LLM service ({0}). Please check network and API Key settings.
errors.api_rate_limited: Too many requests. API service has rate-limited your requests.
errors.api_rate_limit_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Wait a moment and try again
• Reduce request frequency
• Consider upgrading API quota
errors.api_server_error: {0} API service is currently experiencing issues.
errors.api_server_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Try again later
• Check API service status page
• Consider switching to another API provider
errors.api_timeout_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Try again later
• Check network connection speed
• Choose a faster API service
errors.save_corrupted: Save slot {0} file is corrupted or version incompatible.
errors.save_corrupted_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Start a new game
• Try another save slot
• If the issue persists, please report it
errors.save_not_found: Save slot {0} is empty. No save file found.
errors.save_not_found_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Choose another save slot
• Start a new game
errors.save_permission_denied: Permission denied when accessing save file.
errors.save_permission_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Check file permissions
• Ensure write access to save directory
• Run with appropriate permissions
errors.save_failed_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Check available disk space
• Verify save directory permissions
• Try another save slot
errors.config_suggestion:
Suggested actions:
• Enter /api to reconfigure
• Check config file format
• Delete config file and reconfigure
errors.retry_prompt: Auto-retry available. Would you like to try again?

setup.api_key_description: Your API key will be stored securely on your device
setup.api_model_description: GPT-4 is recommended for the best experience

hints.game_shortcut_bar: 1-3: Quick select | Type: Free input | Enter: Confirm | Esc: Clear | ↑↓: Scroll | Ctrl+R: Reload config | q: Quit

log.title: Log System
log.usage_hint: Hint: Use /log level [debug|info|warn|error] to set log level
